things.name: Amber Fort (Amer Palace)
things.description: Magnificent 16th-century Rajput fortress on a hilltop - ride up by elephant or jeep

things.name: City Palace
things.description: Royal palace complex still home to the royal family with a fabulous museum

things.name: Hawa Mahal (Palace of Winds)
things.description: Five-storey pink sandstone screen of 953 honeycomb windows for royal ladies to observe street life

things.name: Jantar Mantar Observatory
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 18th-century astronomical instruments including the world's largest sundial

things.name: Nahargarh Fort
things.description: Hilltop fort at sunset with the best panoramic views over the Pink City

things.name: Johari Bazaar & Bapu Bazaar
things.description: Jaipur's jewellery and textile markets - the best shopping in Rajasthan

things.name: Rambagh Palace Hotel
things.description: The Maharaja's former hunting lodge - the finest palace hotel in India

things.name: Albert Hall Museum
things.description: Indo-Saracenic museum with the finest collection of Rajasthani crafts and antiquities

things.name: Jaigarh Fort & Cannon
things.description: Fort housing the world's largest wheeled cannon - never fired in battle

things.name: Elephant Village (Hathi Gaon)
things.description: Ethical elephant experience - morning spa with elephants at the conservation centre
